description: A worker reports a near-miss incident where a container was nearly dropped. A safety officer must log the incident.

nodes.task_description: Gather details of the incident: time, location, equipment involved, and a description of what happened.

expected_outcome.value: Officer collects all relevant facts about the near-miss.

nodes.task_description: Create a new incident report in the safety management system.

expected_outcome.value: A new report is created with all the gathered details, classified as 'Near-Miss'.

nodes.task_description: Assign an action item to the terminal manager to conduct a toolbox talk on safe lifting procedures with crane operators.

expected_outcome.value: A corrective action is assigned to the relevant manager to prevent recurrence.
